{{Quote|This two-bladed staff requires great skill to wield and is seldom issued to crude foot soldiers.|[[Sorzus Syn]]|<ref name="BoS">''[[Book of Sith: Secrets from the Dark Side]]''</ref>}}
The '''Sith war sword''' was a melee weapon used by [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] and Sith minions during the [[Dark Wars]]. Their double-edged staff-like appearance may have been the forebearer of the [[Double-bladed lightsaber/Legends|double-bladed lightsabers]] preferred by many Sith warriors.

==History==
{{Quote|Aiunta Pall executed Hakagram Graush using Graush's own war sword. I have kept the weapon and plan to use the dried blood upon the blade in my alchemy.|Sorzus Syn|<ref name="BoS" />}}
[[File:Sith_war_sword.jpg|thumb|right|300px|A Sith war sword]]
Most Sith after the fall of the ancient [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]] wielded [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]] in combat, though some still preferred ancient Sith war swords. Sith warriors used them for the feeling of hard metal cutting through soft flesh. They were forged with [[Cortosis/Legends|cortosis]]-weave metal.<ref name="KOTOR II" />

Also, around the time that the [[Exiles|Dark Jedi Exiles]] met with the [[Sith (species)/Legends|original Sith]] on the planet of [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]], [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]]/[[Sith/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Ajunta Pall]] used a Sith War Sword to kill the former [[Hakagram Graush|Sith King]] by [[Sai cha/Legends|decapitation]].

Another type of Sith war sword existed that was not a double-bladed sword, but rather a traditional-looking [[Sword/Legends|sword]]. Instead of cortosis, the blade was treated with [[Sith alchemy/Legends|Sith alchemy]] to produce the lightsaber-impervious effect. This Sith alchemical weapon was not only able to block lightsaber attacks, but also deflect and redirect [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] bolts in much the same way as lightsabers.<ref name="Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide">''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The Sith war sword was intended to appear in the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' but it was removed from the final version of the game. As the weapon was still present in the game files, it could be obtained using cheat codes.<ref name="KOTOR">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>
